name: One-Serving Cheese Puff
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 slices White or whole wheat bread, buttered
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the bread into strips and place them in a 10-oz custard cup with the buttered sides down along the sides and bottom.
2. In a bowl, lightly beat the egg. Add the milk, shredded cheese, onion salt, salt, and hot pepper sauce.
3. Pour the mixture over the bread strips in the custard cup.
4. Place the custard cup on a baking sheet.
5. Bake at 350 degrees for 35-40 minutes or until puffy and golden brown.
6. Serve immediately.
